fields.title: Remove redundant titles from backlog renderers
fields.description: The renderCall already shows the command (e.g. 'backlog status', 'backlog help'), so titles repeated inside result renderers are redundant.nnFix:n1. renderStatusBlock (line ~262): remove the 'Backlog Status' bold title linen2. renderHelpBlock (line ~277): remove the '/backlog help' bold title linennFile: extensions/tau/src/backlog/tool.tsnRun 'npm run gate' from extensions/tau/ after changes.
